name: io.github.jarmstrong158/agentsync-remote
title: agentsync (remote)
description: Self-hosted Cloudflare Worker remote transport for agentsync: a streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint (GitHub-backed, compare-and-swap) so a second device (e.g. your phone) is a full peer in your agent mesh. Deploy your own Worker; the URL below is your deployment.

host.description: Your deployed Cloudflare Worker host, e.g. agentsync-remote.<your-subdomain>.workers.dev

token.description: Your Worker AUTH_TOKEN (set as a Worker secret at deploy time). It is the path credential; keep it private.
